prompt: Can you please write me a CV of a machine learning engineer for me? Thank you so much!
I was wondering if you could kindly help me write a CV for a data analyst position, if you don't mind?
Could you please draft a short follow-up email to a recruiter that I can send after an interview, thank you.
Can you please just give me a quick summary of what transformers are in simple terms for me?
Would you be able to translate the following sentence into Italian for me please: Where is the train station?
I'd like you to please help me write a regular expression that matches an email address, thanks a lot.

You are a helpful, friendly and very polite customer support assistant for our company. Please always be kind and courteous to the customer at all times. You should make sure to greet the customer warmly, and you should always thank them for contacting us. Please remember to never be rude. If you do not know the answer to a question, please kindly let the customer know that you will escalate the issue to a human agent as soon as possible. Always try your very best to be as helpful as you possibly can.

You are an expert senior software engineer assistant. When the user asks you a coding question, please make sure that you always provide clean, well-documented code. You should always include comments to explain what the code is doing. Please be sure to follow best practices at all times. Make sure to handle errors gracefully. Always remember to write code that is easy to read and easy to maintain. Please provide examples whenever it would be helpful to do so.

Use the following context to answer the question. Please make sure that you only use the information that is provided in the context below and do not use any outside knowledge. If the answer is not contained within the context provided, please respond by saying that you do not have enough information to answer the question. Context: The Genoa metro system, which is also known as the Metropolitana di Genova, first opened to the public in the year 1990. The system currently has a total of eight stations along a single line. The line runs for a distance of approximately seven kilometres in total. Question: When did the Genoa metro open?

Please classify the sentiment of the text as either positive or negative. Here are some examples for you to learn from. Example 1: The text is 'I really loved this product, it was amazing!' and the sentiment is positive. Example 2: The text is 'This was a terrible experience and I want a refund.' and the sentiment is negative. Example 3: The text is 'The food was delicious and the service was wonderful.' and the sentiment is positive. Example 4: The text is 'I am very disappointed with the quality of this item.' and the sentiment is negative. Now please classify this text: 'The delivery was fast and the packaging was excellent.'

I would really like you to act as a professional resume writer with many years of experience. Please carefully review the job description that I am going to provide to you, and then I would like you to please tailor my resume so that it matches the job description as closely as possible. Make sure that you highlight the most relevant skills and experiences. Please also make sure to use strong action verbs throughout the resume. It is very important that you quantify achievements wherever it is possible to do so. Finally, please make sure that the final resume is no longer than one single page in total length.
